items.title: Update: Gemini 3.1 Rollout is Underway! 🚀 · google-gemini/gemini-cli · Discussion #19724
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro was released in early 2026 and is now available for AI Ultra and AI Ultra for Business users. The rollout has been confirmed via a discussion thread in the google-gemini/gemini-cli GitHub repository, where the team announced the transition to Gemini 3.1 is underway. The new model has also prompted feature requests across multiple open-source AI coding tools (opencode, openclaw) to add Gemini 3.1 Pro and Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview to their default Google provider configuration

items.title: Gemini Drops: New updates to the Gemini app, March 2026
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet:
Google has been active with Gemini announcements in early 2026. On the model side, Google released Gemini 3 Flash (a fast, cost-efficient frontier model), Gemini 3 Deep Think (optimized for science and engineering reasoning), and Gemini 3.1 Pro (featuring improved reasoning and higher limits for AI Pro/Ultra subscribers). These models represent a significant generational step, with Gemini 3.1 Pro showing notably higher scores on complex problem-solving benchmarks.

On the product side, March 202

items.title: Rate limits | Gemini API | Google AI for Developers
items.author: ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google's Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026, with major model launches and new capabilities. Key releases include Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview (the first Flash-Lite in the Gemini 3 series), Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview optimized for high-volume use), and gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview for real-time audio-to-audio dialogue. Google also launched Lyria 3 music generation models — lyria-3-clip-preview for 30-second clips and lyria-3-pro-preview for full-length son

items.title: Building multi-agent systems - Genkit - Firebase - Google
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet: Genkit is an open-source AI framework developed by Google/Firebase for building production-ready AI-powered applications using familiar code-centric patterns in JavaScript, Go, and Python. It provides abstractions for working with AI models, building multi-step flows with observability, integrating tools and function calling, and deploying to Firebase or other platforms. Key features include a developer UI for testing flows and prompts, built-in telemetry and tracing, type-safe flow definitions,

items.title: AlphaFold — Google DeepMind
items.author: deepmind.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been actively publishing research across multiple domains in early 2026. A standout initiative is Gemini Deep Think, an advanced AI system that has outperformed IMO-Gold benchmarks on Olympiad-level mathematical problems. Two associated papers were published: one (Feng26) where AI autonomously calculated structure constants in arithmetic geometry without human intervention, and another (LeeSeo26) demonstrating human-AI collaboration in proving bounds on systems of interacting

items.title: Google DeepMind on X: Project Genie rollout to AI Ultra subscribers
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind and Google AI have been actively announcing major developments on X (Twitter) in early 2026. Key highlights include the launch of Genie 3, a general-purpose world model capable of generating dynamic, interactive 3D environments from a single text prompt in real-time — a significant leap from Genie 2. Alongside this, Project Genie has begun rolling out to Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. as an immersive prototype to study future world model applications. Google DeepMind als

items.title: New version rollout - Google Antigravity - Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet:
Google Antigravity, the AI coding agent integrated into Google AI Studio, has received several updates in early 2026. Version 1.20.3 (released March 5, 2026) added support for reading agent rules from AGENTS.md in addition to GEMINI.md, deprecated the Auto-continue setting (now enabled by default), and improved conversation load times for long sessions. Google AI Pro and Ultra subscribers now receive priority access to Antigravity with higher rate limits that refresh every five hours.

Google AI

items.title: Google AI Studio is the Secret Weapon for Vibe Coding (And Nobody is Talking About It)
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has launched a full-stack 'vibe coding' experience powered by Gemini, allowing developers to build complete applications from plain English prompts. The platform supports a full-stack runtime with a React frontend and a Node.js backend, enabling secure API calls, database connections, and npm package integration — all managed through natural language chat. An 'Antigravity Agent' handles multi-file context, propagating changes across the entire project and maintaining architectur
